title: COVID-19 Commemoration programme: help and support
body: " This page links to organisations that offer COVID-19 help and support. To learn about the government’s COVID-19 Commemorative programme, visit Commemorating the COVID-19 Pandemic. To explore the different ways you can commemorate COVID-19, visit COVID-19 Commemoration programme: ways to remember.   Please note that this page links to services provided by third-party organisations, for which UK government has no responsibility.  Bereavement support  Get support for yourself or a loved one affected by bereavement.  At a Loss Helping bereaved people find support and wellbeing.  Childhood Bereavement Network Managing a death and bereavement during COVID-19.  Citizens Advice - What to do after a death Guidance about what happens after a death and things you might need to do.  Cruse Bereavement Support Expert bereavement and grief support.  Child Bereavement UK Support for families when a child grieves or when a child dies.  The Good Grief Trust National umbrella network of bereavement services.  GOV.UK - Bereavement help and support Organisations that offer information, support and services.  Marie Curie Support for all aspects of life with terminal illness, dying and bereavement.  National Bereavement Alliance A membership group of organisations supporting bereaved people.  National Bereavement Service Support for bereavement, grief, living with loss and mental health issues.  NHS - Get help with grief Guidance on dealing with bereavement, grief and loss.  Sands Support for anyone touched by pregnancy or baby loss.  Sue Ryder Support for anyone living with a life-limiting illness or grief.  Bereaved family groups  Community groups were formed to campaign, promote remembrance and offer support for those who lost loved ones. Many groups were consulted as part of the UK Commission for COVID-19 Commemoration and as part of the COVID-19 Day of Reflection.  Community groups are independent of government and some are private Facebook groups managed by members of the public.  National Covid Memorial Wall  Friends of the Wall is a team of bereaved volunteers who have cared for and maintained the National Covid Memorial Wall since the summer of 2021. If you have lost a loved one to COVID-19, you can add a dedication to them on their memorial page.  Covid-19 Bereaved Families for Justice UK An umbrella campaign group of bereaved people across the UK. There are a number of groups representing families in different areas across the UK.  Covid-19 Bereaved Families for Justice, Cymru - FacebookCovid-19 Bereaved Families for Justice, Cymru represents all those bereaved by COVID-19 in Wales.  Scottish Covid Bereaved - FacebookScottish Covid Bereaved (formerly Covid-19 Families for Justice, Scotland) is a justice group.  Covid-19 Families UK - FacebookA national network of support groups across the UK for those bereaved by COVID-19 and experiencing other grief during the pandemic.  Covid-19 Families Scotland - FacebookCovid-19 Families Scotland is a support group for those in Scotland bereaved by COVID-19 and experiencing other grief during the pandemic.  Yellow Hearts to Remember - FacebookAn online community that invites people to remember loved ones together by sharing yellow hearts in their windows.
